text.title: Supabase MVP Stack Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are preconditions satisfied: Supabase backend, admin access, user-scoped data, user-facing app?

conclusion.verdict: missing preconditions; non-Supabase or internal-only project; route to alternate methodology

branch.question: Is RLS enabled on every table?

conclusion.verdict: enable RLS; add scoped policies; rotate keys if exposure suspected

branch.question: Are policies scoped to auth.uid() / role (no `TO public USING (true)`)?

conclusion.verdict: replace permissive with scoped; test as anon vs authenticated

branch.question: Are schema changes all in supabase/migrations/?

conclusion.verdict: restore via `supabase migration new`; ban dashboard edits
per-channel payload review; drop PII columns from public channels

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
